The '''SE-14''', also known as the '''Separatist blaster pistol''' or the '''SR combat pistol''' during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], was a basic [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] [[Blaster pistol/Legends|pistol]] produced by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]].

==Description==
The SE-14 [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] consisted of little more than a tube with a grip, and a small [[Blaster power pack/Legends|power pack]] located beneath the muzzle.

It was also referred to as the SR combat pistol.<ref name="Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref> It cost 500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].

==History==
[[File:Separatistpistol.jpg|thumb|left|180px|An SE-14 in use.]]
The SE-14 was used by the [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and was referred to as the Separatist blaster pistol. Due to the touchy situation of producing weapons for an enemy of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], BlasTech denied that it was one of their designs. Nevertheless, the pistol remained in use as a backup weapon for the [[Droid Army]] throughout the conflict.<ref name="BF1 guide" /><ref name="BF2 guide" />

An upgraded version, the [[SE-14C blaster pistol/Legends|SE-14C]], was later released.<ref name="Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary">''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]''</ref>

[[Smuggler/Legends|Smugglers]] and criminals were known to use the SE-14, as evidenced when [[Ponda Baba/Legends|Ponda Baba]] attempted to use one to shoot [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]].<ref name="Card-CCG-Ponda Baba's Hold-Out Blaster">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Ponda Baba's Hold-Out Blaster}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The SE-14 seen in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] is a cut-down Swiss Rexim-Favor submachine gun and is also seen in the movie [[Wikipedia:Alien (film)|''Alien'']].<ref>{{WebCite|url=http://www.partsofsw.com/drevblas.htm|text=The Parts of Star Wars|archiveurl=https://archive.ph/JksA7}}</ref>
